description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior walls are finished in a light brick texture, and the structure features multiple large windows, some arranged in rows and others placed asymmetrically. The house includes a gated driveway and a covered carport area with several parked vehicles, indicating ample parking space. The building has a mix of open and enclosed rooms, with visible interior partitions and a clear separation between living and utility areas. The main entryway is defined by a prominent gate and a paved approach, with the front facade featuring a combination of glass and solid wall sections.
description: A modern, flat-roofed brick house with large windows, a gated driveway, and a covered carport. The structure is spacious with a mix of open and enclosed rooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, carport with parked cars, and the main entryway with large windows.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the brick exterior, window arrangement, and the open carport area.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the flat roof, multiple window placements, and the rear boundary walls.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the carport, driveway, and the arrangement of windows along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some rows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated driveway with a paved approach, main door set back under a covered area, and large glass panels
